How It Works

Our simple three-step process gets your property restored quickly.

1

Call Us

Contact our 24/7 emergency line at (888) 510-9436. We dispatch technicians immediately.

2

We Respond

Our certified technicians arrive quickly, assess damage, and begin extraction.

3

We Restore

We dry, clean, and restore your property to its pre-damage condition.

What Our Clients Say

"Water Damage Champ responded within an hour when our basement flooded. They dried everything thoroughly and handled all the insurance paperwork. Highly recommend!"

— Sarah M., Los Angeles

"Professional, fast, and thorough. They restored our home after a major pipe burst and we couldn't be happier with the results."

— James T., San Diego

"The team was amazing. They arrived quickly, worked efficiently, and even helped us set up a sump pump to prevent future issues."

— Maria L., Tampa

"Excellent service from start to finish. The technicians were knowledgeable and treated our home with care. Would call them again if needed."

— Robert K., Oakland
